creator: empty.japan
caption:
What got you interested in Japan? Was it a book, an anime, a video game, or maybe even a random trip to Japan years ago when you had no idea what to expect? 

For me, it all started with a game called Final Fantasy Tactics Advance, I didn’t even know what a JRPG was back then 😄

I’d love to know what made you curious about Japan in the first place, and how did you fall in love with it?

transcription.text: Don't forget to subscribe for more content!
